NAVAREA XIX 117/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS DAILY IN PERIOND 1600-2300UTC FROM 24AUG TO 03SEP2022 
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND AVOID FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS

 AREA ONE
 69-18.88N 014-31.34E
 69-28.05N 013-56.37E
 69-34.62N 014-10.44E
 69-24.29N 014-42.74E

 AREA TWO
 69-04.00N 015-40.00E
 69-09.00N 015-46.00E
 69-33.00N 015-01.00E
 69-10.00N 014-13.00E

 IF TRANSIT THROUGH THE AREA IS NEEDED, ANDOYA SPACE OPERATIONS DESK CAN BE CONTACTED ON 0047 76 14 45 82 
 OR AT MARITIME VHF CH. 14/16 WITH CALLSIGN "ANDOYA SPACE". 
 RADIO AND PHONE IS MANNED FROM 13.45 UTC.
